creator: yvesguerin@yahoo.ca
text:
[root@pbsd /var/db/pkg]# pkg_create -R -b racoon2-20071227e_1
tar: etc/rc.d/kinkd.sh: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256


look into /usr/local/etc/rc.d
[root@pbsd /var/db/pkg]# ls /usr/local/etc/rc.d/
000.freqshpk            isc-dhcrelay            rinetd
001slpd.sh              kinkd                   rtc.sh
anacron                 knockd                  samba
apcupsd                 lircd                   scand
avahi-daemon.sh         mgeupsd.sh              smsd
avahi-dnsconfd.sh       mgeupsd.sh.orig         snmpd
boa                     mpd                     snmptrapd
boa.sh.sample           mpd4                    snort
bounce                  mpd5                    spmd
cherokee                muddleftpd              stunnel
cupsd                   noip                    sudoscriptd.sh
dbus                    nut                     svscan.sh
ddclient                nut_upslog              upsd.sh
dhid                    nut_upsmon              upsd.sh.orig
doorman                 oftpd                   upsdaemon
ez-ipupdate             opendd                  upsmon.sh
ffserver                openupsd.sh             upsmon.sh.orig
freqshpd                openvpn                 vpnd.sh
hald                    polkitd                 vsftpd
iked                    pptpd                   xfs
isakmpd                 pure-ftpd
isc-dhcpd               racoon

there is no kinkd.sh

Fix: 

cd /usr/local/etc/rc.d
cp kinkd kinkd.sh

rerun: pkg_create -R -b racoon2-20071227e_1

no error :))
How-To-Repeat: install racoon2
pkg_create -R -b racoon2-20071227e_1
